mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice ( noticeno, adminno, title, content, status ) VALUES ( notice_seq.NEXTVAL, #{adminno}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT noticeno, adminno, title, content, rdate, views, status FROM notice ORDER BY noticeno DESC
SELECT noticeno, adminno, title, content, rdate, views, status FROM notice WHERE noticeno = #{noticeno}
SELECT noticeno, title, content, rdate, views FROM notice WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(content) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' ORDER BY noticeno DESC
